name: @meu-jarvis/classifier
description: Classifier PT-PT (Estágio 1 do pipeline AI multi-intent) — invoca GPT-4o-mini via OpenAI structured outputs (json_schema = ClassificationSchema Zod), valida output, language gate PT-PT pré-LLM via regex conservadora, taxonomia tipada de erros, OTel tracing whitelist 10 atributos sem PII (NFR12). Source-only. Consumido pelas Stories 2.5 (Planner+Executor), 2.6 (endpoint /api/agent/prompt), 2.10 (LLM Benchmark).
